_meta.description: Content rotation schedule and publish log for The Automated Solo. The scheduled-publish workflow uses the rotation to determine what TYPE of content to publish next. The agent autonomously decides the topic through research.
_meta.rotation: A repeating 5-slot cycle: tool, playbook, tool, playbook, research. The workflow picks the next slot in sequence.

pillars.tools: Software reviews with active AppSumo or SaaS deals, chosen by the agent based on trending legal-tech products and deal availability
pillars.playbooks: Step-by-step automation workflows, chosen by the agent based on what tools have been reviewed and what gaps exist
pillars.research: Data-driven reports, chosen by the agent based on trending questions in the solo attorney space

published.title: BunnyDoc: eSign Client Agreements Without the DocuSign Monthly Fee
The Consultation-to-Client Pipeline: From Booked Call to Signed Retainer Without the Manual Grind
Agency Handy: Run Your Solo Practice Client Pipeline Like a Modern Service Business
